title: Sydney-based small business looking for support in implementing and operating Monday.com
excerpt: We’re a Sydney small business. We need support in implementing and running Monday.com

posts.author: paulmaley (Paul Maley)
posts.cookedHtml: We’re a Sydney small business. We need support in implementing and running Monday.com

posts.author: Greatnessflows (Philip)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi, I can help you implement and manage Monday.com for your business setting up boards, workflows, automations, and dashboards to fit your processes. I’m also happy to assist with ongoing management and team onboarding.

Happy to discuss your needs here .

posts.author: TeamEasy (Easy Mondays)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @paulmaley ,

Welcome to the Community! We’re a small team too, Melbourne based.

Easy Mondays can assist you with design and ideation, proof of concept, scalability & value, implementation and adoption, documentation, training and support - the whole journey.

Please send an email through to teameasy@easy-mondays.com with your availability to connect this week. We’ll help with expectations and can be available from Monday afternoon.

Best,

Peta

posts.author: deepvyas (Deep Vyas)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @paulmaley
I am interested helping you implement Monday.com for your small business operations. So would appreciate If you can share an requirement document or available for call to better understand.
Just to add integration with existing third party system is possible.

Looking forward to your response here

Regards
Deep

posts.author: Colin2 (Colin)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Paul,

I am experienced Monday.com consultant.

Happy to help you.

You can reach out to me on my email here

Colin
